html:
The Potted Fern is a craftable structure. They are purely for decoration and serve no other purpose. There are 10 different varieties of Potted Ferns. Since there is a limited amount of Ferns which can be picked in a single world, only a limited number of Potted Ferns can be made.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, players have a 1% chance of finding Foliage inside Tumbleweeds, thus making Potted Ferns renewable.

Trivia

  • Potted Ferns were added in A Moderately Friendly Update.

Gallery

  • 10 Potted Ferns in an RoG (SW connected) world.

History

Game Update Version Description
Don't Starve A Moderately Friendly Update None Fern in a Pot has been added to the game.
Don't Starve Together None None Fern in a Pot has been added to the game.
Open Beta 150506 Potted ferns no longer cause a crash.

"pottedfern"
“A fern in a pot.”
–Wilson
“I'd rather burn them.”
–Willow
“It makes me happy.”
–Wolfgang
“Its growth is stunted by the limits of the pot.”
–Wendy
“MAYBE THIS WILL HELP LURE VICTIMS TO MY BASE.”
–WX-78
“A potted plant.”
–Wickerbottom
“It shows my love of plant life.”
–Woodie
“How quaint.”
–Maxwell
“A bit of horticulture warms the spirit.”
–Wagstaff
“What am I meant tö dö with such a thing?”
–Wigfrid
“Mum would like this nice fern.”
–Webber
“It can no longer grow free.”
–Walani
“Nature. Tamed.”
–Warly
“Now whut use 'ave I for a house plant?”
–Woodlegs
“YAWNETH, 'TIS BORING PLANT”
–Wilba
“Stay. Good boy”
–Wormwood
“Aww... A house warming gift. How nice!”
–Wheeler
“That's my kind of decor. Simple.”
–Winona
“A plant, imprisoned for eternity.”
–Wortox
“This plant have little house.”
–Wurt
“It's so... purple!”
–Walter
“I can never seem to keep them alive for long.”
–Wanda
The Potted Fern is a craftable structure. They are purely for decoration and serve no other purpose. There are 10 different varieties of Potted Ferns. Since there is a limited amount of Ferns which can be picked in a single world, only a limited number of Potted Ferns can be made.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
In the Reign of Giants DLC, players have a 1% chance of finding Foliage inside Tumbleweeds, thus making Potted Ferns renewable.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Potted Ferns were added in A Moderately Friendly Update.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
10 Potted Ferns in an RoG (SW connected) world.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Chậu Dương Xỉ là một cấu trúc có thể chế tạo được. Chúng hoàn toàn chỉ để trang trí và không phục vụ mục đích nào khác. Có 10 loại dương xỉ trồng trong chậu khác nhau. Vì số lượng Dương xỉ có thể hái được trong một thế giới là có hạn nên chỉ có thể tạo ra một số lượng hạn chế Dương xỉ trong chậu.

The '''Potted Fern''' is a craftable [[structure]]. They are purely for decoration and serve no other purpose. There are 10 different varieties of Potted Ferns. Since there is a limited amount of [[Ferns]] which can be picked in a single [[world]], only a limited number of Potted Ferns can be made.
=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content==
In the ''[[Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, players have a 1% chance of finding [[Foliage]] inside [[Tumbleweed]]s, thus making Potted Ferns renewable.
=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Potted Ferns were added in ''[[Version History#A Moderately Friendly Update|A Moderately Friendly Update]]''.
